name: Synapse
description: AI-powered primary exam preparation platform for anaesthesia and emergency medicine trainees. Covers ANZCA, ACEM, and CICM primaries. Assessment modes: MCQ (typed/voice), SAQ (photo → AI transcription + grading), VIVA (voice). All grading is based on each college's own materials and curated benchmark answers from the internet.

riskOverrides.note: Any task involving grading content or answer keys is automatically HIGH risk — medical education errors can cause real harm.

autonomySurfaces.note: Synapse starts in a medical-safe read-only autonomy lane. Protected surfaces remain review/validate only until explicitly promoted.

dbState.learning_objectives: ANZCA 330/330 done, CICM 76/247 (31%, needs reset+redo), ACEM 0/609
dbState.saqs: ANZCA 551/551 enriched but 458 missing citations — re-enrichment in progress (~$85 Sonnet). CICM 558/657 (85%, 6 have confidence scores).
dbState.mcq_questions: ANZCA 1,427/1,427 done. CICM 264/264 done. ACEM 1,161/1,543 (75%, 382 missing answers).
dbState.viva_questions: ANZCA 0/1,764 model_answer (only outlines exist — full enrichment ~$380 Sonnet). ACEM 0/117.
dbState.enrichmentOrder: LOs (done) → SAQ re-enrichment (in progress) → VIVA model_answer (next) → MCQ (done)

notes.contentStrategy: Grading is done by Claude against each college's published syllabus and benchmark answers sourced from the internet. Rafael provides domain expertise but does not manually grade every response — Organism handles scale.

assessmentModes.mcq: Standard multiple choice — text or voice input
assessmentModes.saq: Student photographs handwritten answer → OCR + AI grading against rubric
assessmentModes.viva: Voice conversation — AI plays examiner, assesses spoken answer in real-time
